zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Leigh於1537年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾巴辛索普時，她的父親Sir Thomas Leigh29歲，母親Alice Barker18歲。她於1554年11月6日與Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe在英國英格蘭倫敦結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1613年在她的家鄉享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾巴辛索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Leigh于1537年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾巴辛索普时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Leigh29岁，母亲Alice Barker18岁。她于1554年11月6日与Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe在英国英格兰倫敦结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1613年在她的家乡享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾巴辛索普。

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

variants.name: Leah
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Leigh was born in 1537, in Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Leigh, was 29 and her mother, Alice Barker, was 18. She married Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe on 6 November 1554, in London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1613, in her hometown, at the age of 76, and was buried in Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Leigh est née en 1537, à Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Leigh, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alice Barker, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe le 6 novembre 1554, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1613, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Leigh 1537 in Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Leigh 29 und ihre Mutter Alice Barker 18. Sie hat am 6. November 1554 in London, England, United Kingdom Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1613 im Alter von 76 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Leigh è nata il nel 1537 nel Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas Leigh, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Alice Barker, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe il 6 novembre 1554, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1613, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Leighが1537年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアバシンソルペで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Leighは29歳，母Alice Barkerは18歳であった。1554年11月6日にイギリスイギリスロンドンでEsq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1613年に故郷で76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアバシンソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Leigh(이)가 1537년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 배징소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Leigh(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Barker(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1554년 11월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1613년 그녀의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 배징소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Leigh nasceu em 1537, em Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Leigh, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alice Barker, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe em 6 de novembro de 1554, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1613, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Leigh родилась в 1537 г. в местности бассингтаурп, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Leigh было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Barker, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe 6 ноября 1554 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1613 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности бассингтаурп, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Leigh nació en 1537, en Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Leigh, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alice Barker, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Esq. Sir Frances Thomas de Coney of Basingthorpe el 6 de noviembre de 1554, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1613, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Bassingthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
